transfer.certificate.CfnAbout: Imports the signing and encryption certificates that you need to create local (AS2) profiles and partner profiles.

transfer.certificate.ActiveDate.Description: An optional date that specifies when the certificate becomes active.

transfer.certificate.Certificate.Description: The file name for the certificate.

transfer.certificate.CertificateChain.Description: The list of certificates that make up the chain for the certificate.

transfer.certificate.Description.Description: The name or description that's used to identity the certificate.

transfer.certificate.InactiveDate.Description: An optional date that specifies when the certificate becomes inactive.

transfer.certificate.PrivateKey.Description: The file that contains the private key for the certificate that's being imported.

transfer.certificate.Tags.Description: Key-value pairs that can be used to group and search for certificates.

transfer.certificate.Usage.Description: Specifies whether this certificate is used for signing or encryption.
